files.name: __init__.py
files.description: Visualization Module — 3D Geometry for Reinforced Concrete Elements

files.name: geometry_3d.py
files.description: 3D Geometry Module — Coordinate Computation for Visualization

classes.name: RebarSegment
classes.description: A single straight segment of a reinforcement bar.

classes.name: RebarPath
classes.description: Complete path of a reinforcement bar with multiple segments.

classes.name: StirrupLoop
classes.description: A single stirrup (closed loop) with optional internal ties.

classes.name: Beam3DGeometry
classes.description: Complete 3D geometry for a beam section ready for visualization.

classes.name: BuildingBeam3D
classes.description: Line representation of a beam in building context.

functions.name: building_to_3d_geometry
functions.description: Build line geometry for a multi-beam building view.

functions.name: compute_rebar_positions
functions.description: Compute Y-Z positions for main bars in a beam cross-section.

functions.name: compute_stirrup_path
functions.description: Compute the corner points of a stirrup in the Y-Z plane.

functions.name: compute_stirrup_positions
functions.description: Compute X positions for stirrups along beam span.

functions.name: compute_beam_outline
functions.description: Compute 8 corner points of beam bounding box.
